title: Waila
description: Plugin showing the block you are currently looking at.
body:
# Waila plugin [![img](https://i.imgur.com/HvQxAih.png) ![img](https://i.imgur.com/Re0ctmZ.png)](https://discord.gg/vvnRgJMXvV) Do you want your players to play better? Thanks to this plugin, they will find out without unnecessary difficulties whether they can destroy this block, what falls out of it and how long it will take to extract such a block. # Functions
- Displaying the name of the block we are looking at - Display of information whether we can destroy a given block - Display of the current block strength depending on the item in hand - Display change when block cannot be destroyed - Ability to change configuration - Show block drop by clicking shift - Block drop depends on the item you are holding - Ability to change icons, icon color, bossbar color and style and more - The range of the targeted block can be changed - Ability to change how often the bossbar changes - Notifications about updates - system recipe-search (Just Enough Items (JEI) / Roughly Enough Items (REI)) - The block recipe appears when you right-click on it, without holding anything in your hand, crouching. - Possibility to rename the gui of the recipe shown - Possibility to change the message about no recipe found - very good possibility of interfering with the appearance of the gui - the ability to view the burn-through recipe - Displaying the name of the entity along with its health - Show percentage of plant growth
# Screenshots ![img](https://i.imgur.com/eErsQfq.png) ![img](https://i.imgur.com/268bX3b.png) # Commands & Permissions
## /Waila ● Permission: *waila.toggle* ● Description: Hide/Show waila bossbar
# Config
[`*LINK*`](https://code.skript.pl/fYhx6wjy)
## Supporting *@oskarq_yt#7155* - **50 PLN** # Sponsors **null** # bStats [![img](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Waila-Lite.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/Waila-Lite/16549) # Other plugins [![img](https://i.imgur.com/yYZcqw3.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/dropsmp) [![img](https://i.imgur.com/vdMYSNT.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/108439/) [![img](https://i.imgur.com/ulf93IH.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/waila) [![img](https://i.imgur.com/GPmps0G.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/110595/)

I used the translator to write this text so some things may be confusing.
